evals.prompt: I'm building a landing page for a SaaS product and I need a hero image — something futuristic and clean, maybe with a gradient background and abstract shapes. Save it to public/images/hero.png
evals.expected_output: Loads generate-asset workflow. Crafts a detailed prompt about futuristic SaaS hero image with gradient and abstract shapes. Uses wavespeed generate image with --output public/images/hero.png and --json. Selects an appropriate model (flux-dev or similar). Presents the result and file path.

assertions.text: Crafted prompt includes futuristic, clean, gradient, abstract concepts
Selects appropriate image model with reasoning

evals.prompt: I have this logo at assets/logo.png and I want to turn it into a short animated video for our social media intro. Something with a subtle zoom and maybe some particles.
evals.expected_output: Loads generate-asset workflow. Recognizes this is image-to-video. Uses wavespeed generate video --image assets/logo.png with a prompt about zoom and particles. Auto-selects wan-2.1/image-to-video model. Downloads and saves the output video.

assertions.text: Prompt describes zoom and particle motion

evals.prompt: The product photo I just generated has a cluttered background — can you change it to a clean white studio background? The file is at product-shot.png
evals.expected_output: Loads iterate-design workflow. Uses wavespeed edit --image product-shot.png with a clear prompt about changing background to white. Uses flux-kontext-pro model. Presents the edited result and asks if the user is satisfied or wants further refinement.

assertions.text: Edit prompt describes white studio background
Offers to iterate further if unsatisfied

evals.prompt: I need placeholder images for 4 blog posts: one about AI, one about sustainability, one about remote work, and one about cybersecurity. Make them 1200x630 for social sharing.
evals.expected_output: Loads batch-generate workflow. Creates 4 prompts for each topic. Confirms the plan (4 images, size 1200x630, model selection). Generates sequentially with progress reporting. Presents a summary table of all 4 outputs.

assertions.text: Generates exactly 4 wavespeed generate image commands
Each command has unique topic-specific prompt
